MHS Arcade
  • Barcode Scanner [Deprecated]
  • Usage
  • View page source

Usage

Starting the Scanner

Run the main script:

./barcode_scanner.py

Behavior

  1. The system waits for barcode input from the USB scanner.

  2. Upon scanning, it checks the barcode against: - whitelist.txt → If matched, marks as allowed. - blacklist.txt → If matched, marks as denied.

  3. Unknown barcodes are logged for review.

Logging

  • All scans are recorded in logs/YYYY-MM-DD.log.

  • Each entry includes: - Timestamp - Barcode value - Validation result (whitelisted, blacklisted, unknown)
